positive: A stylish, minimalist illustration of a whimsical astronaut soaring through a nebula made of abstract watercolor splashes. The astronaut is silhouetted against a vibrant cosmic backdrop of deep sapphire blues, electric violets, and pops of glowing cyan. The design should incorporate repeating celestial elements like stylized planets, constellations, and crescent moons. Emphasize clean lines, high contrast, and a flat, graphic aesthetic suitable for t-shirt printing. Vector art influence, elegant composition, centered subject, gradient color wash, vibrant yet soothing palette. Full body astronaut, sense of motion, celestial bodies, watercolor drip effect, space travel, cosmic fantasy.
negative: blur, noise, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, logo, low resolution, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poor composition, messy details, photo, realistic photo, grainy, cluttered, complex background
